categories.label: Lint suppressions
categories.description: Biome rules intentionally disabled or broadly suppressed that can hide real issues.

categories.label: A11y debt
categories.description: Accessibility suppressions and uncovered accessibility contract gaps for local primitives.

status_rules.green: 0 disabled a11y rules and current matrix
status_rules.amber: 1 or more disabled a11y rules or host-only a11y evidence pending

categories.label: CSS lint coverage gap
categories.description: CSS excluded from the current lint surface due parser/tooling constraints.

status_rules.green: CSS is included in the lint surface or covered by an equivalent explicit check
status_rules.amber: CSS is excluded from Biome and tracked as warn-first debt
status_rules.red: CSS exclusion state cannot be determined

categories.label: Integration drift
categories.description: Drift between upstream/contracts and local integration seams, including Apps SDK, exports, wrappers, and alignment stamps.

status_rules.green: alignment stamp is within the configured freshness window
status_rules.amber: alignment stamp is stale or only locally verified
status_rules.red: alignment source is unreadable or drift command fails

categories.label: Gate reliability debt
categories.description: Known flaky, degraded, sandbox-blocked, or host-only quality signals that reduce confidence in passing CI.

status_rules.amber: host-only, flaky, blocked, or unstable gates remain documented
